def: An upfront charge by a lender for processing, underwriting, and funding a loan. Typically a percentage of the loan amount.
avoid: Compare APRs including origination fees across lenders; ask for lender credits.

def: A charge incurred when you spend more than you have in your checking account and the bank covers the shortfall.
avoid: Opt out of overdraft coverage so transactions are declined without a fee; link a savings account.

def: A monthly charge for receiving a physical paper statement by mail instead of electronic statements.
avoid: Switch to electronic statements and online account access to eliminate this fee.

def: A charge for required building, construction, or renovation permits from local government authorities.
avoid: Verify that your contractor actually obtains permits; ask to see the permit documentation.

def: An extra charge for upgraded services, faster processing, or enhanced features.
avoid: Evaluate whether the premium service is worth the extra cost; ask for premium fees to be waived as a loyalty perk.
